generated_oml:
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current for motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentData
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current (I_M) data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from current using manufacturer constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for robot component description"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation and friction model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DynamicModelExchangeService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset description and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of robot performance data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of robot components using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computational processes"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data streaming via MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization dashboard for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DynamicModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling improved motion accuracy through dynamic friction model exchange"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison (simulated vs. measured)"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computational processes for audit and validation"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission from physical to virtual components"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot motion and friction parameters"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing with live measurements; specific time rates not specified in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Passive digital shadow integrating structural SysML models, simulation models (Simulink), real-time sensor data via MQTT, and visualization dashboard; one-way data flow from physical system to virtual shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) with real-time monitoring and model refinement during robot operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for asset description and system modeling."
]
